segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: Hello everyone.
segments.zh: 大家好。我是杰克·史蒂文斯，是你们在这家酒店的接待员。我相信你们都会在这里玩得很开心。让我先介绍一下我们提供的一些活动。首先，我会说说为客人准备的一些短途旅行。

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: I'm Jake Stevens and I'm your rep here at the hotel.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: I'm sure you'll all have a great time here.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: So let me tell you a bit about what's on offer.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: I'll start by telling you about some of the excursions that are available for guests.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: One thing you have to do while you're here is go dolphin watching.
segments.zh: 在这里一定要做的一件事就是去观赏海豚。在我们的乘船旅行中，我们几乎保证你能看到海豚——如果没看到，你可以免费再参加一次。我们每天组织旅行，只需35欧元。不幸的是，今天下午的旅行已经没有名额了，但可以来找我预订本周晚些时候的。

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: On our boat trips, we pretty well guarantee you'll see dolphins – if you don't you can repeat the trip free of charge.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: We organise daily trips for just 35 euros.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: Unfortunately there aren't any places left for this afternoon's trip, but come and see me to book for later in the week.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: If you're energetic, I'd recommend our forest walk.
segments.zh: 如果你精力充沛，我推荐我们的森林徒步。这是一个有导游的徒步，大约七公里。中途会停一次，提供饮料和三明治。有一些相当陡峭的山坡，所以你需要相当健康，穿好鞋子，并带上防水衣物以防下雨。只需25欧元全包，每周三举行。

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: It's a guided walk of about seven kilometres.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: There'll be a stop half way, and you'll be provided with a drink and sandwiches.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: There's some fairly steep climbs up the hills, so you need to be reasonably fit for this one, with good shoes, and bring a waterproof in case it rains.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: It's just 25 euros all inclusive, and it's every Wednesday.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: Then on Thursdays we organise a cycle trip, which will give you all the fun of biking without the effort.
segments.zh: 然后在周四，我们组织一次自行车之旅，让你享受骑车的乐趣而无需费力。我们会把你和你的自行车带到拉纳山顶，然后让你自己骑回来——在短短20公里内下降700米，所以这不适合没有经验的骑行者，因为你会骑得很快。如果天气晴朗，你还能看到绝佳的景色。

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: We'll take you and your bike up to the top of Mount Larna, and leave you to bike back – it's a 700-metre drop in just 20 kilometres so this isn't really for inexperienced cyclists as you'll be going pretty fast.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: And if it's a clear day, you'll have fantastic views.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: On our local craft tour you can find out about the traditional activities in the island.
segments.zh: 在我们的当地手工艺之旅中，你可以了解岛上的传统活动。这次旅行最好的地方是它完全免费。你会被带到一家制作珠宝的工厂，还有一个陶瓷中心。如果你愿意，可以买一些产品，但这完全由你决定。旅行在周四午饭后开始，你会在下午6点前返回。

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: And the best thing about this trip is that it's completely free.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: You'll be taken to a factory where jewellery is made, and also a ceramics centre.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: If you want, you can buy some of the products but that's entirely up to you.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: The trip starts after lunch on Thursday, and you'll return by 6 pm.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: If you're interested in astronomy you may already know that the island's one of the best places in the world to observe the night sky.
segments.zh: 如果你对天文学感兴趣，你可能已经知道这个岛是世界上观察夜空的最佳地点之一。我们可以为感兴趣的人提供周五去天文台的旅行。每人90欧元，你会看到巨大的望远镜，并有一位专家讲解它们的工作原理。之后我们会前往日落海滩，如果你想的话，可以在那里泡一泡海水，然后返回酒店。

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: We can offer trips to the observatory on Friday for those who are interested.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: They cost 90 euros per person and you'll be shown the huge telescopes and have a talk from an expert, who'll explain all about how they work.

segments.speaker: JAKE STEVENS
segments.en: Afterwards we'll head down to Sunset Beach, where you can have a dip in the ocean if you want before we head off back to the hotel.

items.prompt: What information does the speaker give about each of the following excursions?

pairs.note: 题干中的'dolphin watching'与原文完全一致，直接定位。

pairs.p: One thing you have to do while you're here is go dolphin watching.

paraphrase.explain: 题干问关于'dolphin watching'的信息，原文开头直接提到'dolphin watching'并给出细节，因此定位到该句。

pairs.note: 题干问信息，原文给出具体细节（距离），属于同义替换。
